en_title: Nintendo Direct Announced for This Week, as Fans Expect Huge Switch 2 Reveals
cn_title: 任天堂本周举办直面会，Switch 2 新作阵容引期待
subtitle: 急急急急急
opus_summary: 任天堂宣布本周二举办Nintendo Direct，时长50分钟，随后有95分钟Treehouse实机演示。直面会聚焦2026年下半年Switch 2游戏，传闻包括《塞尔达传说：时之笛》重制版等。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo has announced its next Nintendo Direct broadcast revealing details of upcoming Switch 2 games, which will stream online later this week.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂宣布将于本周晚些时候举办新一期 Nintendo Direct，公布即将登陆 Switch 2 的游戏详情。

paragraphs.en: Fans will be able to tune in tomorrow, Tuesday June 9, at 7am Pacific / 10am Eastern / 3pm UK time. The main show will last 50 minutes, before a 95-minute Treehouse Live segment straight after. You'll be able to watch right here on IGN, and we'll be reporting all of the big reveals live.
paragraphs.cn: 粉丝们可在明天（6月9日周二）太平洋时间早7点/东部时间早10点/英国时间下午3点（北京时间6月9日晚10点）收看。主节目时长50分钟，随后还有95分钟的 Treehouse Live 实机演示环节。你可以在 IGN 观看直播，我们也将实时报道所有重大发布。

paragraphs.en: Anticipation for this Nintendo Direct is sky high, as rumors swirl around what the company has in store for the latter half of 2026, and following a lengthy wait since the last full Nintendo Direct broadcast — all the way back in September 2025.
paragraphs.cn: 玩家对本次直面会的期待值极高，因为自上次完整版 Nintendo Direct（2025年9月）以来已过去许久，而关于任天堂2026年下半年的计划传闻四起。

paragraphs.en: Intriguingly, Nintendo has said this Direct will focus on titles releasing in the second half of 2026 — suggesting the company still has several surprises in store for this fall and winter. This may also serve as a way to set expectations that we won't see the next 3D Mario, which is believed to be coming in 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 有趣的是，任天堂表示本次直面会将聚焦2026年下半年发售的游戏——这意味着该公司在今年秋冬仍有多款惊喜作品。这或许也是在降低预期：我们不会看到下一款3D《马力欧》，该作据信将于2027年推出。

paragraphs.en: The months since have seen smaller shows dedicated to indie and third-party games, as well as a string of announcements released via social media and the company's Nintendo Today app. Now, however, it's time for a proper show.
paragraphs.cn: 此后的几个月里，任天堂举办了多场专注于独立游戏和第三方作品的小型发布会，并通过社交媒体及 Nintendo Today 应用发布了一系列公告。而现在，终于到了正式登场的时候。

paragraphs.en: So, what do we expect? Well, trusted leaker NatetheHate — who now has a strong Nintendo track record — has previously spilled details of a The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake due out this Christmas. The project would also tie into 2026 being the Zelda franchise's 40th anniversary — could other Zelda projects also be on the way, or could we get a first trailer for next year's live-action Zelda movie?
paragraphs.cn: 那么，我们期待什么？可靠的爆料人 NatetheHate（此前对任天堂的爆料记录良好）曾透露，《塞尔达传说：时之笛》重制版计划于今年圣诞节发售。该项目也与2026年《塞尔达传说》系列40周年相契合——是否还有其他塞尔达项目在筹备中？或者我们能否看到明年真人版《塞尔达》电影的首支预告？

paragraphs.en: Other leaks and rumors have whispered of a new Wario game, 2D Metroid, a Switch 2 Edition for Pikmin 4, and a fresh Switch Sports title. We'll also likely see more of the Switch 2's already-announced summer lineup, including Star Fox (June 25), Rhythm Heaven Groove (July 2), Splatoon Raiders (July 23), and Fire Emblem Shadows (September 25).
paragraphs.cn: 其他泄露和传闻还提到一款新《瓦力欧》游戏、2D《密特罗德》、《皮克敏4》Switch 2 版以及一款全新的《Switch Sports》作品。我们可能还会看到更多已公布的 Switch 2 夏季阵容详情，包括《星际火狐》（6月25日）、《节奏天国 奇迹之星》（7月2日）、《斯普拉遁 涂击队》（7月23日）和《火焰纹章 Shadows》（9月25日）。

paragraphs.en: Of course, the past few days have already seen a string of third-party announcements for Switch 2, which will see Activision's Spyro: A Ream Beyond and Sega's Crazy Taxi: World Tour in 2027, a new Star Trek horror game from Silent Hill 2 developer Bloober Team, Rayman Legends Retold from Ubisoft, Monster Hunter Wilds and Resident Evil Veronica from Capcom, Minecraft Dungeons 2 from Microsoft, and Final Fantasy 7: Revelation from Square Enix next spring.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，过去几天已有一系列第三方 Switch 2 游戏公布：Activision 的《小龙斯派罗：天外国度》和世嘉的《疯狂出租车：世界巡游》将于2027年发售；《寂静岭 2》开发商 Bloober Team 将推出一款《星际迷航》恐怖游戏；育碧的《雷曼：传奇 重述》；卡普空的《怪物猎人：荒野》和《生化危机 维罗妮卡》；微软的《我的世界：地下城2》；以及史克威尔艾尼克斯将于明年春季推出的《最终幻想7：启示录》。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips 是 IGN 的新闻编辑。可通过 tom_phillips@ign.com 联系他，或在 Bluesky 上找到他。

translated_terms.Rhythm Heaven Groove: 节奏天国 奇迹之星
